title: Mouse Cursor unusable after windows 10 creator update
author: mj9652
body_snippet:
<!--
Only file GitHub issues for bugs and feature requests.  All other topics will be closed.

Before opening an issue, please search for a duplicate or closed issue.
Please provide as much detail as possible for us to fix your issue.
-->

Since getting hit with the windows 10 creators update, the cursor in the remote desktop has become mostly unusable. It is very tiny and when the cursor changes to an insertion marker (as in a text editor) it completely disappears. 

Tried fiddling wit...

iterations.description: Mouse cursor issue after Windows 10 Creator Update (2017) is likely resolved by newer Windows/RDP updates; no recent confirmation of reproduction on current builds despite two triage refresh requests

comments.author: sparerd
comments.snippet:
Thanks for the report @mj9652 

Is the mouse cursor an acceptable size when using the built-in Remote Desktop Connection program for rdp?

comments.author: kmscode
comments.snippet: I don't have this problem on Win 10 1703. What's your display resolution. Maybe this is a HiDPI (#321) related issue?

comments.author: TiloGit
comments.snippet:
see also here [MS technet](https://social.technet.microsoft.com/Forums/en-US/2c4f1b5b-f95b-4e0f-923e-68ff608691ce/small-or-missing-mouse-pointer-in-rdp-session-solved)
and here other [RDP tool ](https://support.royalapplications.com/support/solutions/articles/17000049404-mouse-cursor-issue-with-high-dpi-in-remote-desktop-sessions  )
and MS feedback https://aka.ms/G6c867

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

notes:
AI triage: Mouse cursor issue after Windows 10 Creator Update (2017) is likely resolved by newer Windows/RDP updates; no recent confirmation of reproduction on current builds despite two triage refresh requests
Approach: Close as stale if no response within 30 days; if reproduced, investigate RDP ActiveX cursor rendering settings in ProtocolRDP.cs
